title: Underground
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Underground'''" was the primary [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Tilnes]]. It was located at the center of the tunnel networks of the mining moon, and it served as a gathering place for individuals from the different mining companies. The politics of the companies were forgotten here. "The Underground" was run by a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] named [[Maris Gen]].

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Broken Orbits: Tilnes Rising}}
